schedules.description: Schedules visible in the namespace, drained from the iterator. Use describe_schedule for the full record of one entry.

id.description: Business identifier of the schedule. Pass to pause_schedule / unpause_schedule / trigger_schedule / delete_schedule / describe_schedule.

paused.description: True when the schedule is currently paused. Paused schedules do not fire on their cron ticks.

note.description: Free-form note attached to the schedule (set by create / pause / unpause). Empty when unset.

workflow_type.description: Name of the workflow type the schedule fires. Empty when the schedule's action is not a workflow.

next_fire_times.description: Up to 5 next scheduled fire times (RFC 3339 timestamps). The SDK does not paginate this list — when the iterator is exhausted, these are the only times available.
